skills.name: Only Fast
skills.description: After moving 8 yards, Chou's next Basic Attack deals 180% damage and briefly slows the target by 80%.
skills.comboUsage: Move around to build passive, then strike with Basic Attack combined with other skills.
skills.macroUsage: Maintain movement speed to ensure the passive is always up before engaging.
skills.weaknesses: Requires moving, can be useless if CC'd.
skills.counterplay: Avoid Chou when his hands are glowing.

skills.name: Jeet Kune Do
skills.description: Chou punches forward 3 times. The 3rd punch knocks airborne enemies.
skills.comboUsage: Use 1st and 2nd punch to close the gap, 3rd punch to knock up.
skills.teamfightValue: AoE knock up allows for great setups.
skills.counterplay: Use dash or purify to escape the 3rd knockup.

skills.name: Shunpo
skills.description: Chou dashes forward, gaining Crowd Control Immunity while dashing.
skills.comboUsage: Use during incoming CC to outplay, or after Skill 1 third phase to reset S2.
skills.teamfightValue: Bait out enemy key CC skills.
skills.weaknesses: Timing is crucial; missed timing leads to death.
skills.counterplay: Wait for Shunpo to be used before casting CC.

skills.name: The Way of Dragon
skills.description: Chou kicks the target, knocking them back and dealing Physical Damage. He can follow up to deal more damage.
skills.teamfightValue: Can completely remove the enemy carry from the fight.
skills.counterplay: Purify, Suppression, or stick together as a team.

aiTags.powerSpikeTiming: Level 4, completion of Blade of the Heptaseas
aiTags.draftSignalValue: Signals aggressive pick-off, can be flexed as Roam or EXP.
aiTags.hiddenGameplanSynergy: Pair with burst mages to instantly delete kicked targets.

skills.name: Air Superiority
skills.description: Based on flying speed, Fanny's damage increases. Applies prey mark.
skills.comboUsage: Constantly fly to maintain high damage and energy regen via marks.
skills.macroUsage: Force fights where she can wall-spam.
skills.teamfightValue: Allows continuous teamfight presence if marks are applied.

skills.name: Tornado Strike
skills.description: Fanny whirls her blade, dealing Physical Damage to nearby enemies.
skills.comboUsage: Triggers automatically when flying past enemies.
skills.strategicPurpose: Main source of sustained AoE damage.
skills.teamfightValue: Lethal AoE damage in cramped areas.
skills.weaknesses: High energy cost if manually casted without cable.

skills.name: Steel Cable
skills.description: Fanny throws out a cable that draws her to the first obstacle it hits.
skills.comboUsage: Multiple cables for map traversal, straight cables for wall-spam.
skills.macroUsage: Split pushing and instant rotation to teamfights.
skills.weaknesses: Requires walls, vulnerable in open spaces.
skills.counterplay: Fight in open areas, use targeted CC.

skills.name: Cut Throat
skills.description: Fanny initiates a quick attack on an enemy, dealing massive Physical Damage.
skills.counterplay: Use Aegis/Wind of Nature when she dives.

aiTags.draftSignalValue: Signals aggressive early invade, heavy blue buff dependency.
aiTags.hiddenGameplanSynergy: Pair with Angela or hard setters like Tigreal.
aiTags.objectiveControlValue: High (can steal easily with retribution + cable).
